channel.title: Blackrock on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Blackrock on Archive 03

item.title: RWA Tokenization: Wall Street Is Making Its Move
item.description: Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization is moving beyond the experimental stage with the participation of traditional financial giants like BlackRock and Franklin Templeton. We explore whether this is Wall Street’s next big play or just a niche experiment.

item.title: Ondo Finance ($ONDO): A Deep Dive into the RWA Leader
item.description: A deep dive into Ondo Finance ($ONDO), the emerging leader in Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization. Between its growth potential through a partnership with BlackRock and the potential risks of regulation and centralization, three characters fiercely debate the pros and cons of this new financial innovation.
